title: Does Kaji have STDs
wikitext:
[]: Does Kaji have STD's?             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Dec 28, 2008 7:17 pm I'd make a productive argument for my silly point like I do in all my "oh you, BK!" threads, but honestly this just popped into the top of my head. Discuss?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 28, 2008 7:36 pm "Oh, you BK!" Anyway, no. Although he flirts with women, I'd say and was only with Misato and vice-verse. (Although both might have had some fun with Ritsuko back in college, but that's purely something for the pervy fans to wish had happened. >_>; )

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun Dec 28, 2008 7:43 pm SSD wrote: Although both might have had some fun with Ritsuko

[]:             Quote Post by Nasmoe » Sun Dec 28, 2008 7:53 pm If Kaji had STDs, Shinji's doomed.

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Sun Dec 28, 2008 8:15 pm Gonorrhea makes me cream my pants, but not in the good way.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Dec 28, 2008 8:23 pm Kaji seems like a smart guy, so unless he did some stupid things before he met Misato, he should be safe. Misato on the other hand...

[]:             Quote Post by Nasmoe » Sun Dec 28, 2008 8:31 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Kaji seems like a smart guy, so unless he did some stupid things before he met Misato, he should be safe. Misato on the other hand...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 28, 2008 8:41 pm SSD wrote: Although he flirts with women, I'd say and was only with Misato and vice-verse.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 28, 2008 8:52 pm Reichu wrote: Aside from the concept of lifelong monogamy appealing to a sense of extreme romanticism, there's no reason to think he hasn't had other sexual partners.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Dec 29, 2008 2:59 am no such thing as STD's in anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Nasmoe » Mon Dec 29, 2008 3:12 am slothen wrote: no such thing as STD's in anime.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Dec 29, 2008 11:02 am Kaji clearly had a bunch of STD's, I mean, just look at the guy.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Dec 29, 2008 5:10 pm This whole topic reminds me of the Saturday Night Live skit where James Bond learns that he has every STD known to man, along with some wholly new ones. Unfortunately I can't find a copy on the web.

[]:             Quote Post by Count A'ight » Mon Dec 29, 2008 11:39 pm There is no evidence anywhere in the canon to suggest that Kaji has an STD.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 30, 2008 12:08 pm Count A'ight wrote: There is no evidence anywhere in the canon to suggest that Kaji has an STD.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 30, 2008 1:56 pm OF COURSE Kaji gets some, he's not just the James Bond of the show, he's a freakin' buffet of manliness!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 30, 2008 2:59 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: OF COURSE Kaji gets some, he's not just the James Bond of the show, he's a freakin' buffet of manliness!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 30, 2008 3:38 pm Kamina's awesome, but he's something of um....an idiot? At least Kaji thinks things through before doing them (all the more reason I'd doubt he'd get STIs).

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 30, 2008 6:10 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Kamina's awesome, but he's something of um....an idiot?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 30, 2008 7:25 pm I know this is meant to be a silly thread, but to be serious for a moment there's always the possibility that Kaji knew he was living on borrowed time. Or, that he was like Rei with having a death wish. At any rate, I'm sure he knew that he'd die after helping Fuyutsuki which is why he left that message to Misato.
